notes: NON-DISCRIMINATING on all 3 evals (15/15 both configs). Baseline independently reproduced the full skill-creator methodology — MUST-language openers, adjacent-skill NOT-for exclusions, the repo-root evals/<skill>/evals.json path (correctly rejecting the older in-skill path), same-turn with-skill+baseline runs, non-discriminating + high-variance analyst checks, workspace-vs-tracked separation, topic-vs-activity diagnosis, and 20 near-miss trigger queries. The new-path-convention hint did not discriminate: baseline used the correct path unprompted.
with_skill was marginally richer (tighter near-miss negatives, description closer to the ~80-word target) but never flipped an expectation.
